allow: PowerShell(Set-Location "c:\\Users\\aliha\\OneDrive\\Documents\\GitHub\\MigrationFingerprint"; [Console]::OutputEncoding = [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8; $env:PYTHONPATH="."; $demo="$env:TEMP\\fp-dod"; Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $demo -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item -ItemType Directory $demo | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse data\\fingerprints "$demo\\fp"; $py = ".venv\\Scripts\\python.exe"; "=== STEP 1: prioritized suite \(targeted, not generic\) ==="; & $py -m src.cli suite --pair omni-zos-to-omni-linux --fingerprint-dir "$demo\\fp" | Select-Object -First 4; "=== STEP 2: clean pair -> green scoreboard ==="; & $py -m src.cli run --pair omni-zos-to-omni-linux --source-dir data/samples/source/PLN-CLEAN-01 --target-dir data/samples/target/PLN-CLEAN-01 --fingerprint-dir "$demo\\fp" --runs-dir "$demo\\runs" | Select-Object -First 3)
